debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2) = exp (b ^ 2) - exp (a ^ 2)

failed_attempts:
have h : ∀ x, HasDerivAt (fun x => exp (x ^ 2)) (2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) x := by
    intro x
    exact (exp (x ^ 2)).hasDerivAt.comp x (hasDerivAt_id.mul_const 2 |>.add_const 3 |>.pow 2)
      (by continuity)
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt h (by continuity) (by continuity)]

have h : ∀ x, deriv (fun x => exp (x ^ 2)) x = 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2) := by
    intro x
    rw [deriv_exp]
    rw [deriv_pow]
    ring
  rw [← integral_deriv_eq_sub (by continuity : Continuous (fun x => exp (x ^ 2))) (by continuity : Continuous (fun x => 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)))]
  simp_all

    rw [pow_two]
    ring_nf

    simp [deriv_id, deriv_const]
    ring
  rw [← integral_deriv_eq_sub _ _ (by continuity)]
  · exact h
  · continuity
